name: 12.5"x8.2" Metal and Glass Outdoor Pillar Candle Holder Lantern Black - Threshold™
description:
Create a warm, inviting glow in your outdoor oasis with this Metal and Glass Outdoor Pillar Candle Holder Lantern from Threshold™. Designed with a black metal frame and clear glass panels, this lantern lets candlelight shine through while adding structure and contrast to patios, decks or outdoor tables. The open interior accommodates a single candle of your choice, making it easy to switch it up for everyday evenings or special gatherings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
